lb-023i.title: Create defaults/ directory with default agent config
lb-023i.description: Create defaults/ directory with default agent config files for external mode: (1) defaults/CLAUDE.md — copy of root CLAUDE.md but self-modification section references .harness/Dockerfile instead of scripts/runner/Dockerfile, (2) defaults/AGENTS.md — copy of root AGENTS.md, (3) defaults/claude-settings.json — copy of .claude/settings.local.json. Also create project.conf.example with documented fields: REPO_URL, BRANCH, LOCAL_PATH.

lb-0gof.title: End-to-end test: init.sh against a real repo
lb-0gof.description: Test scripts/init.sh properly: (1) Create a temporary test repo with an existing CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, and .claude/settings.local.json with existing hooks. (2) Run init.sh against it. (3) Verify: CLAUDE.md has harness sections with correct .harness/Dockerfile reference, .gitignore has harness entries without duplicates, settings.local.json has merged permissions AND merged hooks (lb prime alongside existing hooks). (4) Run init.sh again — verify idempotency (no duplicated content). (5) Verify scripts/run.sh works from the initialized repo (at least the preflight/setup portion). Clean up test repo afterward.

lb-1n9x.title: Create scripts/init.sh — core init script
lb-1n9x.description: Create scripts/init.sh that copies harness files into an existing repo. Accepts target repo path as argument. Steps: (1) validate target is a git repo, (2) copy scripts/ directory, (3) copy AGENTS.md, (4) copy .env.example, (5) create SPEC.md from template if absent, (6) merge .gitignore entries (append harness entries not already present: logs/, .env, *.log, *.jsonl, !tests/*.jsonl, .claude/settings.local.json), (7) merge CLAUDE.md (append harness sections under <!-- ralph-harness-start/end --> markers, skip if markers already present for idempotency), (8) merge .claude/settings.local.json (union permissions.allow arrays, merge hooks objects), (9) print summary of actions taken.

lb-1nv7.title: Implement 'mrmouth init' — scaffold config in a repo
lb-1nv7.description: Create .mrmouth/config.toml with sensible defaults, optionally create .mrmouth/Dockerfile, add .mrmouth/ entries to .gitignore. Much simpler than the old init.sh — just creates config, doesn't copy scripts.

lb-3ocz.title: Update .gitignore and end-to-end test
lb-3ocz.description: Update .gitignore to add: projects/*/.env, projects/*/logs/. Then end-to-end test: create projects/test-project/project.conf pointing at a test repo, create projects/test-project/SPEC.md with a simple task, run scripts/run.sh test-project, verify: correct repo cloned, overlays applied, agent works, no harness files committed to target, logs in projects/test-project/logs/. Also verify scripts/run.sh (no arg) still works identically for template mode.

lb-3yz9.title: Remove lib.sh overlay system and external/init mode logic
lb-3yz9.description: Delete resolve_project(), resolve_overlay(), build_overlay_dir() from lib.sh. Remove all RALPH_MODE conditionals. lib.sh should just set paths and env vars for the single (template) mode. Delete scripts/init.sh entirely.

lb-46sk.title: Implement 'mrmouth epic' — work through an epic
lb-46sk.description: Port run-epic.sh logic: loop agent runs focused on a specific litebrite epic until all tasks in the epic are done.

lb-5tdk.title: Update container entrypoints for overlay injection
lb-5tdk.description: Update scripts/runner/run.sh and scripts/runner/run-epic.sh: after cloning the target repo and before lb init, check for /overlay/ directory mount. If present, copy files into workspace: /overlay/CLAUDE.md -> workspace/CLAUDE.md (if not already present), /overlay/AGENTS.md -> workspace/AGENTS.md (if not already present), /overlay/SPEC.md -> workspace/SPEC.md (if not already present), /overlay/claude-settings.json -> workspace/.claude/settings.local.json (mkdir -p .claude first, if not already present), /overlay/Dockerfile -> workspace/.harness/Dockerfile (always, for self-modification). If /overlay/ does not exist, behavior is identical to today (template mode).

lb-5um2.title: Implement 'mrmouth run' — core agent session
lb-5um2.description: The main command. Build Docker image (shell out to docker CLI), run container with repo mounted or cloned, stream output with formatting, handle log capture, pull changes after agent exits. Port the essential logic from the current bash run.sh + runner/run.sh.

lb-8eon.title: Port stream-fmt.ts to Rust
lb-8eon.description: Rewrite the JSONL stream formatter in Rust. Parse Claude's stream-json output, format it for terminal display. This removes the bun dependency. Used by 'ralph run' for real-time output.

lb-8v63.title: run.rs preflight should skip dirty-tree check in --local mode
lb-8v63.description: run.rs preflight() always checks for a clean working tree (line 157-166). But in --local mode you're bind-mounting the working directory — the agent is meant to work on it directly. Requiring a clean tree defeats the purpose of local mode, especially for bootstrap where there may be uncommitted scaffolding.

lb-9k17.title: Rewrite README with docs for all 3 modes
lb-9k17.description: Full rewrite of README.md to document template mode, external mode, and init mode. Include prerequisites, running the agent, how it works, and complete file table.

lb-b2bb.title: Create scripts/lib.sh — shared project resolution
lb-b2bb.description: New file sourced by all host scripts. Contains: resolve_project() — accepts optional project name, if projects/<name>/project.conf exists sets RALPH_MODE=external and loads REPO_URL/BRANCH/LOCAL_PATH from it, otherwise sets RALPH_MODE=template with current behavior (git remote from own repo). resolve_overlay() — finds config file with priority: projects/<name>/ > defaults/ > repo root. build_overlay_dir() — assembles resolved overlay files into a temp dir for Docker mounting. Exports: RALPH_MODE, RALPH_REPO_URL, RALPH_BRANCH, RALPH_LOCAL_PATH, RALPH_LOG_DIR, RALPH_ENV_FILE, RALPH_VOLUME, RALPH_HARNESS_DIR, RALPH_PROJECT_DIR.

lb-b5ig.title: Structured JSONL logging with live stream formatter
lb-b5ig.description: Port physarum's stream-json + formatter pattern to ralph_harness. Switch from plain --verbose text to --output-format stream-json (JSONL), pipe through tee (durable storage) then TypeScript formatter (live colored terminal output). Test in ralph-test-13 before lifting to harness.

lb-chol.title: Update host scripts for JSONL pipeline
lb-chol.description: Update scripts/run.sh: add --raw flag support (skip formatter for scripting), change log extension to .jsonl, pipe docker output through 'tee $log_file | bun run stream-fmt.ts', update symlink to latest.jsonl. Update scripts/run-epic.sh: add logging pipeline (currently has none), add --raw flag, pipe through tee + formatter to logs/epic-EPIC-TIMESTAMP.jsonl, add latest.jsonl symlink.

lb-dmuh.title: Fix init.sh: properly merge hooks instead of skipping
lb-dmuh.description: MEDIUM BUG: scripts/init.sh hook merging is incomplete. If the target repo already has a PreCompact or SessionStart hook, the harness's lb prime hook is silently dropped. Instead, the merge should append harness hooks to existing hook arrays for each event key. Use jq to merge the arrays rather than skipping if the key exists.

lb-fdtj.title: Simplify runner/run.sh to template-only
lb-fdtj.description: Remove the /overlay conditional block that copies CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SPEC.md, claude-settings.json, and Dockerfile into the workspace. In template mode the repo already has these files, so the overlay logic is unnecessary.

lb-g4rj.title: Teach agent it can self-modify (Dockerfile, deps) across loop iterations
lb-g4rj.description: The agent reinstalls Rust every run because the container is ephemeral. It doesn't realize that changes committed to git (like modifying the Dockerfile to add Rust) persist across loop iterations. Add guidance to CLAUDE.md or the runner prompt so the agent knows it can modify its own infrastructure and benefit from it in subsequent runs.

lb-h0pc.title: Update scripts/run.sh for external mode
lb-h0pc.description: Source scripts/lib.sh. Accept optional project name as first non-flag argument. In external mode: use RALPH_REPO_URL/RALPH_BRANCH instead of git remote, run preflight checks against RALPH_LOCAL_PATH, use RALPH_LOG_DIR for logs, use RALPH_ENV_FILE for --env-file, use RALPH_VOLUME for Docker volume name, mount overlay directory into container (-v "$overlay_dir:/overlay:ro"), post-run: docker cp container:/workspace/.harness/Dockerfile to projects/<name>/Dockerfile if changed (before docker rm), pull into RALPH_LOCAL_PATH. Template mode (no project arg) must work identically to today.

lb-h3ux.title: Init script — adopt harness into existing repo
lb-h3ux.description: An init.sh script that copies harness files into an existing repo, handling conflicts with existing CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, and .claude/settings.local.json. Run as: scripts/init.sh /path/to/existing-repo. End state is identical to having used the GitHub template.

lb-h8k7.title: Fix bugs and harden attach-to-existing-repo feature
lb-h8k7.description: Review found several bugs and gaps in the init script and external mode implementation. This epic covers fixing the critical bug, medium issues, and proper end-to-end testing.

lb-hdke.title: Mr Mouth: Rust CLI tool
lb-hdke.description: Rewrite ralph as a standalone Rust CLI distributed via cargo install / GitHub releases. ralph becomes an external tool you run from inside any repo. Config lives in the target repo (.ralph/). Single mode: always external. Subcommands: run, loop, epic, init, summary. Replaces the current bash harness entirely.

lb-iizd.title: Update remaining host scripts for external mode
lb-iizd.description: Update scripts/run-epic.sh, scripts/run-loop.sh, and scripts/decide.sh to support external mode: (1) run-epic.sh — source lib.sh, same project resolution and overlay mounting as run.sh, (2) run-loop.sh — pass project name through to run.sh and decide.sh, (3) decide.sh — accept optional project name, cd to RALPH_LOCAL_PATH so litebrite and SPEC.md access work correctly. All scripts must work identically in template mode (no project arg).

lb-j4ge.title: Create ralph-test-13 test bed
lb-j4ge.description: Initialize a new repo at /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/ralph-test-13. Copy structure from ralph-test-12 (scripts/, CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, .env.example, .gitignore, Cargo.toml, src/, etc). This is our sandbox for testing logging changes without affecting the harness. Push to GitHub as coobeeyon/ralph-test-13.

lb-ja4p.title: Summary subcommand is still a stub
lb-ja4p.description: main.rs line 151-153: Commands::Summary just prints 'not implemented yet'. Needs actual implementation — read log file, call claude CLI with haiku model, write markdown summary. The loop_cmd.rs generate_summary() already has most of this logic and could be extracted.

lb-kn83.title: Switch claude to stream-json output format
lb-kn83.description: Update scripts/runner/run.sh: add --output-format stream-json to claude invocation. Remove redundant inner tee and logdir/logfile setup (container is ephemeral, host tee persists logs). Update scripts/runner/run-epic.sh: add --output-format stream-json, change per-task log extension from .log to .jsonl (keep inner tee here since multiple tasks run in one container).

lb-l7ra.title: Fix init.sh: append defaults/CLAUDE.md instead of root CLAUDE.md
lb-l7ra.description: CRITICAL BUG: scripts/init.sh appends the root CLAUDE.md which tells agents to edit scripts/runner/Dockerfile. It should append defaults/CLAUDE.md which correctly references .harness/Dockerfile for external mode repos. Find the line that does 'cat "$harness_dir/CLAUDE.md"' and change it to 'cat "$harness_dir/defaults/CLAUDE.md"'. Verify by reading both files and confirming the self-modification section differs.

lb-lhgt.title: Update summary.sh and .gitignore for JSONL
lb-lhgt.description: Update scripts/summary.sh: change default from latest.log to latest.jsonl, change basename stripping from .log to .jsonl. Claude/haiku parses JSONL natively so prompt needs no change. Update .gitignore: add *.jsonl (currently only has *.log).

lb-n8qx.title: Implement config loading from .mrmouth/
lb-n8qx.description: Read .mrmouth/config.toml from the current working directory. Define the config schema: model, docker image settings, custom Dockerfile path, timeout, etc. Use serde + toml crate. Provide sensible defaults when no config exists.

lb-ndrw.title: Test init script end-to-end
lb-ndrw.description: Test scripts/init.sh against repos with various states: (1) empty repo with no existing files, (2) repo with existing CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, and .claude/settings.local.json, (3) run init twice to verify idempotency — second run should not duplicate content. Verify that scripts/run.sh works from the initialized repo afterward.

lb-o7ca.title: docker.rs DEFAULT_DOCKERFILE keeps Rust toolchain in image
lb-o7ca.description: The embedded DEFAULT_DOCKERFILE in docker.rs installs Rust twice (once as root, once as runner user) and keeps the full toolchain. The current harness Dockerfile cleans up rustup after building lb. This bloats the image significantly. Should either clean up after installing lb, or install lb from a prebuilt binary/GitHub release instead.

lb-oar7.title: Set up GitHub releases and cargo publish for Mr Mouth
lb-oar7.description: Add CI workflow for cross-compiling (linux x86_64, linux aarch64, macOS). Publish binaries as GitHub releases. Set up Cargo.toml for crates.io publish. Follow the same pattern litebrite uses.

lb-ojkd.title: Write SPEC.md for Mr Mouth Rust CLI
lb-ojkd.description: Define the tool: what it does, how it's invoked, config format (.mrmouth/config.toml), subcommands (run, loop, epic, init), how it interacts with Docker, how it reads repo config, what the base Dockerfile looks like, distribution story (cargo install + github releases). This is the blueprint for all subsequent tasks.

lb-p44p.title: Scaffold Mr Mouth Rust project with clap CLI
lb-p44p.description: cargo init, add clap with derive feature, define subcommands: run, loop, epic, init, summary. Just the CLI skeleton — subcommands can print 'not implemented' for now. Set up Cargo.toml with metadata for eventual crates.io publish.

lb-p455.title: Implement 'mrmouth loop' — repeated runs with decider
lb-p455.description: Port run-loop.sh logic: run agent, check if more work remains (via decide.sh equivalent), repeat. The decider calls Claude API to assess whether to continue. Add max-iterations and cooldown config.

lb-pggs.title: Gut external/init modes and simplify to template-only
lb-pggs.description: Remove external mode, init mode, overlay system, projects/, defaults/, and all supporting code. Simplify run.sh and runner/run.sh to only handle template mode. Update README and CLAUDE.md. This cleans up the codebase so agents building v2 have less noise.

lb-pur0.title: run.rs git_remote_url fails for repos with no remote
lb-pur0.description: run.rs line 24 calls git_remote_url() unconditionally. In --local mode with a brand new repo (or no repo at all), there's no remote yet. Should skip or make optional when --local is set, since the repo URL is only needed for cloning inside the container.

lb-pwdo.title: External/stealth mode — run harness against repo from outside
lb-pwdo.description: The harness stays in its own repo and operates on target repos without adding any files to them. Adds a projects/ directory for per-project config. Run as: scripts/run.sh my-app. Target repo never gets harness files committed. Full backwards compatibility with template mode (no arg = current behavior).

lb-pz2p.title: Create scripts/stream-fmt.ts formatter
lb-pz2p.description: Port physarum's scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts to scripts/stream-fmt.ts. Nearly verbatim copy — it's already generic. Handles: system/init, assistant (tool_use for Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Agent, thinking, text), user (tool_result with code block collapsing), result (done summary with cost/turns). TTY-aware colors. Suppresses noisy tools (TodoRead/Write, TaskCreate/Get/Update/List, Read). Source: /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/physarum/scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts

lb-q71j.title: Simplify run.sh to template-only
lb-q71j.description: Remove project_name arg parsing, overlay_dir logic, external mode docker args (overlay mount, LOCAL_PATH bind mount), Dockerfile extraction from container, and all RALPH_MODE conditionals. Should just: check clean tree, build image, run container, pull changes.

lb-rl57.title: Create test fixtures and verify formatter
lb-rl57.description: Create tests/sample.jsonl with representative stream-json events (init, assistant with tool calls + thinking, user with tool results, result with cost/turns). Verify: 1) cat tests/sample.jsonl | bun scripts/stream-fmt.ts shows formatted output 2) echo 'plain text' passes through unchanged 3) --raw mode works. This validates the pipeline without running claude-under-claude.

lb-tapt.title: loop_cmd summary and decider should run in parallel
lb-tapt.description: loop_cmd.rs runs generate_summary() then should_continue() sequentially (lines 53-58). These are independent — summary writes to a file, decider checks task state. Run them in parallel (e.g. with threads) like we already do in the bash run-loop.sh.

lb-twbl.title: Update README.md and CLAUDE.md for template-only
lb-twbl.description: Rewrite README to describe the single mode: this is a template repo, you create a repo from it, agents work on it. Remove all docs about external mode, init mode, and overlay system. Update CLAUDE.md if it references external/init modes.

lb-w1xa.title: Remove defaults/ directory and external mode tests
lb-w1xa.description: Delete defaults/ (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, project.conf.example, claude-settings.json). Delete tests/test-external-mode.sh and tests/test-init.sh. These all support modes being removed.

lb-wmho.title: Remove dead code and fix path inconsistency
lb-wmho.description: Two cleanup items: (1) Remove the unused docker_volume_args() function from scripts/lib.sh — it's never called, the logic is inline in run.sh and run-epic.sh. (2) Fix path inconsistency in scripts/runner/run-epic.sh — it hardcodes /workspace while scripts/runner/run.sh uses $HOME/workspace. Make them consistent.

lb-xahc.title: Config::find_repo_root fails for bootstrap (no .git)
lb-xahc.description: config.rs find_repo_root() walks up looking for .git (line 98-105). In the bootstrap use case there's no git repo yet — user is in an empty directory. mrmouth init already handles this by requiring a .git dir, but the broader bootstrap flow (mrmouth run --local in a new directory) would fail. Need to handle the no-repo case, at least for --local mode.

lb-xn4d.title: End-to-end test: external/stealth mode against a real repo
lb-xn4d.description: Test external mode properly: (1) Create a test repo on GitHub (or use an existing throwaway). (2) Create projects/test-project/project.conf pointing at it with REPO_URL, BRANCH, LOCAL_PATH. (3) Create projects/test-project/SPEC.md with a trivial task. (4) Run scripts/run.sh test-project. (5) Verify: correct repo is cloned in container, overlay files appear in workspace, agent can read SPEC.md and use litebrite, no harness files are committed to target repo, logs land in projects/test-project/logs/. (6) Also run scripts/run.sh with no args and verify template mode still works identically. Clean up test project config afterward.

lb-ybur.title: atty crate is deprecated — use std::io::IsTerminal
lb-ybur.description: run.rs uses atty::is() (line 81) for TTY detection. The atty crate is deprecated in favor of std::io::IsTerminal which landed in Rust 1.70. Since we target stable Rust this should be a straightforward swap — removes a dependency.

lb-yhld.title: Fix prompt.rs Dockerfile reference
lb-yhld.description: DEFAULT_PROMPT in prompt.rs line 27 still says 'Edit scripts/runner/Dockerfile' — should reference .mrmouth/Dockerfile instead.
